query:
-- Update Recknagel to March start date (2025-03-01)
UPDATE deals 
SET contractStartDate = '2025-03-01'
WHERE customerName = 'Recknagel' AND aeId IN (2, 30002);

-- Remove onboarding fee from Recknagel
UPDATE deals 
SET onboardingFeePaid = false
WHERE customerName = 'Recknagel' AND aeId IN (2, 30002);

-- Remove onboarding fee from Apollo
UPDATE deals 
SET onboardingFeePaid = false
WHERE customerName = 'Apollo' AND aeId IN (2, 30002);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute -- Update Recknagel to March start date (2025-03-01)
UPDATE deals 
SET contractStartDate = '2025-03-01'
WHERE customerName = 'Recknagel' AND aeId IN (2, 30002);

-- Remove onboarding fee from Recknagel
UPDATE deals 
SET onboardingFeePaid = false
WHERE customerName = 'Recknagel' AND aeId IN (2, 30002);

-- Remove onboarding fee from Apollo
UPDATE deals
